title: Update Parameter Golf leaderboard with BOS fix
author: cocohearts
novel_contributions: Directly credits CaseOps submissions (#1729/#1736) and related PRs (#1787, #1797, #1851/#1868) while preserving score order
Recognizes CaseOps as valid due to bijective mapping and byte sidecars for original UTF-8 BPB
Supersedes #1899 by accounting for later live PRs
Excludes PPM-D/byte-mixture PRs pending C2 ruling
Excludes #1855 as a separate row because of higher p value
